evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: hyper-croissance; ultra-performante; exécution rapide; rapidité d'exécution
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Velocity dominates: repeated emphasis on speed (hyper-growth, rapid execution, fast-paced), AI-native culture, and deployment velocity outweigh rigour signals.
evidence.domain_risk: B2B data enrichment; SaaS; ARR and revenue metrics
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: B2B SaaS selling data products—errors affect commercial decisions without regulatory/financial reporting consequence, placing it at moderate risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: premier(e) Data engagé(e) à plein temps; vous la créez; you will define; first data hire; building from zero
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Explicitly first full-time data hire, creating the function from clean foundations—classic early-stage signal despite existing infrastructure.
evidence.jd_authorship: Structurer les couches de données; pousser plus loin les modèles dbt; Vous utilisez déjà au quotidien des outils comme Cursor ou Claude
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Highly specific technical responsibilities (dbt Cloud, BigQuery, Basedash, Cursor, Claude Code), AI tooling expectations, and revenue metrics show hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: ARR, churn, unit economics, activation; data serve directly to generate revenue; sales, marketing, finance, product teams
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Strong commercial framing: primary goal is enabling GTM/revenue operations metrics and commercial team decisions.
evidence.autonomy_level: vous la créez; partenaire hautement stratégique; mener des analyses complexes qui feront pivoter le business; autonomie totale
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic ownership language: 'create the function', 'strategic partner', 'drive business decisions'—high autonomy in both strategy and execution.
evidence.ai_role: L'équipe code l'intégralité du projet dbt dans Cursor / Claude Code avec du développement assisté par IA; Vous utilisez déjà au quotidien des outils comme Cursor ou Claude
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Candidate expected to use AI coding tools (Cursor, Claude Code) daily to accelerate their own work—clear ai_user signal.
evidence.testing_framing: rigoureux(se) sur la qualité des données; les fondations sont ultra-propres, documentées et testées
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality is named as core responsibility with ownership framing; testing mentioned as foundational requirement.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: les fondations sont ultra-propres, documentées et testées; rigoureux sur la qualité
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: data quality is a concern but framed within operational reliability, not as risk control or compliance concern.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Structurer les couches de données; vous la créez; Build from clean foundations
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Greenfield dominant: first data hire, building data function from scratch on clean foundations.
